data.raceComments: {"comment":"10. HEADSTREAM opened this prep with a win two runs ago. Fair effort last time out when closing off soundly at Port Macquarie. Won't find this as tough so she can make amends. 2. ANDROS proved too strong two runs ago at this track. Plugged away for third in testing conditions last start at Ballina, after being in the firing line on the corner. Has a solid record at this course and distance, including a win and three minor placings. No reason he can't atone. 4. ORMOND ROAD performed in line with market expectation when resuming at Eagle Farm. Is another that will find this easier and will have come on with that run under his belt. Is a likely improver that can make his presence felt. 3. MINGARDOS  returns and looks best of the rest, though will need some luck from the draw.","runners":[10,2,4,3],"exclusive":false}
